models.summary: Structured heart disease risk model with 9 clinical input features.
models.description: Estimates a heart disease risk probability from structured cardiovascular features. The output risk_score is a 0 to 1 probability-like score where larger values indicate higher risk.

input_features.name: sex
input_features.label: Sex
input_features.description: Biological sex used by the demo model.

input_features.name: fasting_blood_sugar
input_features.label: Fasting Blood Sugar Flag
input_features.description: 1 means fasting blood sugar is above 120 mg/dL. 0 means fasting blood sugar is 120 mg/dL or below.

input_features.name: exercise_angina
input_features.label: Exercise Induced Angina Flag
input_features.description: 1 means exercise induced angina is present. 0 means it is absent.

input_features.name: oldpeak
input_features.label: Oldpeak
input_features.description: ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest.

output_spec.name: risk_score
output_spec.label: Risk Score
output_spec.description: Heart disease risk probability produced by the demo model. The value is between 0.0 and 1.0, and lower values indicate lower risk.
